sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking on blue block
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

print("Pink/charcoal at top:")
for label, seg in [("BEFORE", before), ("AFTER", after)]:
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] in ('P', 'c') and n['pixels'] <= 64:
            print(f"  {label}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check if blue blocks changed
print("\nBlue objects:")
for label, seg in [("BEFORE", before), ("AFTER", after)]:
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'b':
            print(f"  {label}: pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash'][:8]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
